title: Rust File Structures and Templates
description: Templates for automatically creating Rust project files

templates.when_to_create: User requests a hello world program or basic main.rs file
User requests a new Rust project or Cargo.toml file
examples: Create a new Rust project called myapp
Make a Cargo.toml for project foo

templates.when_to_create: User requests a library crate or lib.rs file
User requests integration tests or test files
User asks to create a struct in a new file
examples: Generate a Config struct in src/config.rs
Make a new struct called Database

templates.when_to_create: User requests a module directory structure
